name: Cafe Simulator
author: Poki
description: Cafe Simulator is a management game where you take charge of your very own cafe! Serve delicious coffee to your customers and watch the money roll in. Use your earnings to buy new equipment for desserts like cake and ice cream, hire staff to help you out, and upgrade your skills and speed. Expand your business and transform your humble cafe into the most popular spot in town. Can you brew your way to success and run the best cafe around? How to play Cafe Simulator? Move with WASD or arrow keys. You could also use the joystick or click and drag to move! Who created Cafe Simulator? Cafe Simulator is created by SwiftRoll.This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Cafe Simulator for free? You can play Cafe Simulator for free on Poki. Can I play Cafe Simulator on mobile devices and desktop? Cafe Simulator can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
